'''Luxum''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Shard (species)|Shard]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] that trained under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Aqinos]]. Like the rest of the [[Iron Knight]]s, Luxum joined the [[New Jedi Order]] when discovered on the planet [[Dweem]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Luxum was driven close to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] by the [[Battle of Kalarba|destruction]] of [[Hosk Station/Legends|Hosk Station]]. With [[IG-179]], one of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous's]] former bodyguards, serving as her chief lieutenant, she fought against the technophobic [[Yuuzhan Vong]], but was eventually killed by them.

==Behind the scenes==
Luxum is a creation of [[Abel G. Peña]].
